contract_repair_log.summary: Same Svelte->TSX defect class as MT-098 / MT-102; React 19 + Vite + TypeScript per app/package.json. Replaced lib/stores/caa.ts (Svelte-store convention) with lib/ipc/caa.ts + lib/ipc/caa.test.ts. Added adjacent Tauri command surface app/src-tauri/src/commands/caa.rs (CaaExtractRequestIpc / CaaExtractResultIpc + kernel_model_runtime_caa_extract) because MT-103 implemented caa::extract_caa_vector only at the kernel/lib level.

title: INF-5 CAA UI (paired-prompt editor + extract wizard)
goal: CAA wizard UI in Inference Lab: paired-prompt editor (table of context + positive/negative completion pairs), [Extract CAA vector] button, layer picker, save+activate flow. Hidden via capabilities.supportsActivationSteering == false.
expected_diff_shape: New React/TSX CaaWizard.tsx + lib/ipc/caa.ts (Tauri IPC binding) + lib/ipc/caa.test.ts (vitest); integration into existing InferenceLab.tsx parent; CSS additions; adjacent Tauri command surface app/src-tauri/src/commands/caa.rs (wraps caa::extract_caa_vector).
unblock_conditions: MT-098 steering UI + MT-104 eval merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES. CaaWizard.svelte: table view with columns [Context, Positive completion, Negative completion]; add-row / delete-row; import from JSON; layer-index picker (dropdown from model n_layers); [Extract CAA vector] calls kernel_model_runtime_caa_extract (Tauri wrapper around MT-103); preview generation with vector active at intensity 1.0; [Save & activate] persists with provenance=Contrastive{technique:CAA}. Hidden via capability gate. Operator-content discipline: prompt cells accept verbatim adult-production content; license tag picker mandatory.
risk_if_missed: INF-5 UI missing; operator cannot run CAA extraction interactively.
validator_focus: Paired-prompt structure preserved (three columns); hidden when unsupported; license tag.

proof.pnpm_typecheck: PASS (cd app && pnpm run typecheck => exit 0)
proof.vitest_caa_ipc: PASS 1/1 (src/lib/ipc/caa.test.ts: extractCaa sends camelCase request envelope with name/description/pairs/layer)
proof.cargo_test_caa_command: PASS 2/2 (app/src-tauri/src/commands/caa.rs::tests::* covering camelCase DTO serialization + all 5 input-validation paths: empty name, empty description, empty pairs, blank positive, blank negative)
proof.audit_still_pass: automation-first-audit reports status=PASS / command_count=48 / 0 violations after adding kernel_model_runtime_caa_extract to both generate_handler! arms
proof.three_column_paired_structure: CaaWizard.tsx renders a <table data-testid='caa-wizard.table'> with explicit Context / Positive completion / Negative completion columns plus per-row Add / Remove and import-from-JSON
proof.hidden_when_unsupported: Component returns null when capabilities.supportsActivationSteering is false
proof.license_tag_picker_mandatory: <select data-testid='caa-wizard.license'> Permissive | SourceModelLicenseOnly | Restricted; serialised into the description sent to the kernel
